name: Dijonnaisetm Glazed Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 1 pound 4th rib or loin pork chops
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat the corn oil over medium-high heat. Add the pork chops and cook until lightly browned on both sides and thoroughly cooked. Remove the chops from the skillet and drain any fat.
2. In a small bowl, combine the creamy mustard blend, apricot preserves, sliced green onions, and soy sauce. Pour this mixture into the skillet.
3. Cook over low heat, stirring occasionally, until slightly thickened. Return the pork chops to the skillet, turning them to coat evenly with the glaze. Heat through.
4. Makes 4 servings.
